payload.answer: Detected duplicate Slack event delivery (same event ID). No additional durable memory committed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input indicates the same Slack event ID was delivered twice (retry/duplicate). No new facts beyond the duplicate receipt are provided.

details: No memory cards created to avoid committing superseded/duplicated information

repair_options: If the first processing attempt failed, re-run parsing for that event using the original message payload.
